services.title: What I can build for you
services.copy: Solutions that are easy to understand, visually modern and ready to evolve with your business.

items.title: Professional showcase website
items.description: A modern website to present your business, your services, your contacts and strengthen your credibility.

items.title: Management web application
items.description: A platform tailored to your needs: members, clients, stock, payments, requests or reporting.

items.title: Hosting & maintenance
items.description: Deployment, configuration, backups and maintenance to keep your website stable and secure.

about.title: I build websites that create a truly professional image
about.descriptionOne: I am a web developer based in Antananarivo. I help SMEs, associations and entrepreneurs build an online presence that is clear, modern and credible.
about.descriptionTwo: My goal is not only to code, but to help you attract more clients through a fast, well-structured and easy-to-use website.

projects.title: Deliveries focused on usability, clarity and operational value.
projects.copy: Every project aims for the right balance between image, ease of use and measurable impact.

items.title: AntaTech Solutions
items.description: Portfolio redesign into a premium showcase built to present the offer more clearly, reassure prospects and accelerate contact.

items.title: A.E.U.T.N.A
items.description: Association platform to manage members, dues, events and communications through an admin flow that stays simple to use.

items.title: World of Madagascar Tour
items.description: Travel-focused digital experience built to showcase tours and streamline bookings for authentic trips in Madagascar.

method.title: A simple and clear process
method.copy: The client should understand how you work. That builds trust and shows professionalism.

steps.title: Discussion
steps.description: We clarify your needs, goals, pages and the features required.

steps.title: Wireframe
steps.description: I propose a clear structure before starting the full development.

steps.title: Development
steps.description: Creation of the website or application with a clean, modern and maintainable foundation.

steps.title: Delivery
steps.description: Deployment, tests, adjustments and support after delivery.

pricing.title: Simple offers to get started
pricing.copy: Pricing can be adjusted depending on the client, number of pages, features and delivery timeline.

plans.name: Starter
plans.description: For a simple and professional online presence.

plans.name: Business
plans.description: For SMEs, restaurants, service businesses and entrepreneurs.

plans.name: Application
plans.description: For a specific need with an admin area.

plans.name: Hosting
plans.description: For a client who already has a project and only needs hosting.

pricing.notice: If you choose a website creation package, hosting is included free of charge for 1 year.

testimonials.ctaCopy: Let’s discuss your needs and turn them into a concrete, modern and useful solution for your business.

faq.title: Frequently asked client questions
faq.copy: A few clear answers to the questions that come up most often before starting a website or platform project.

items.question: How long does it take to build a website?
items.answer: A simple showcase website can take from a few days to two weeks depending on the content, number of pages and validation rounds.

items.question: Is hosting included?
items.answer: Hosting can be included depending on the package chosen. It can also be handled separately if you already have your own solution.

items.question: Can I edit the content after delivery?
items.answer: Yes. The site can be designed so you can easily update text, images and key information after launch.

footer.copy: Websites, Laravel/React applications, hosting and maintenance for founders, SMEs and associations.
